mapper.update: UPDATE PLACE SET PLC_NAME = #{dto.plcName}, PLC_ADDR = #{dto.plcAddr}, /* 🚀 새로 추가된 필드들 업데이트 로직 반영 */ PLC_DADDR = #{dto.plcDaddr}, PLC_TELNO = #{dto.plcTelno}, PLC_HOMEPAGE = #{dto.plcHomepage}, PLC_OVERVIEW = #{dto.plcOverview}, PLC_FLT_CD = #{dto.plcFltCd}, PLC_LAT = #{dto.plcLat}, PLC_LOT = #{dto.plcLot}, PLC_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE PLC_NO = #{plcNo}

UPDATE PLACE_SEE SET SEE_INFOCENTER = #{dto.seeInfocenter}, SEE_PARKING = #{dto.seeParking}, SEE_RESTDATE = #{dto.seeRestdate}, SEE_USETIME = #{dto.seeUsetime}, SEE_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE SEE_PLC_NO = #{plcNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLACE p WHERE p.PLC_CAT_CD = 'PLC001'
AND p.PLC_USE_YN = 'N'
AND p.PLC_USE_YN = 'Y'
AND p.PLC_RGN_CD = #{rgnCd}

SELECT p.PLC_NO AS plcNo, p.PLC_ID AS plcId, p.PLC_RGN_CD AS plcRgnCd, p.PLC_NAME AS plcName, p.PLC_ADDR AS plcAddr, p.PLC_DADDR AS plcDaddr, p.PLC_LAT AS plcLat, p.PLC_LOT AS plcLot, p.PLC_TELNO AS plcTelno, p.PLC_HOMEPAGE AS plcHomepage, p.PLC_OVERVIEW AS plcOverview, p.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL AS plcMainImgUrl, p.PLC_THUM_IMG_URL AS plcThumImgUrl, p.PLC_FLT_CD AS plcFltCd, s.SEE_USETIME AS seeUsetime, s.SEE_PARKING AS seeParking, s.SEE_RESTDATE AS seeRestdate, s.SEE_INFOCENTER AS seeInfocenter FROM PLACE p LEFT JOIN PLACE_SEE s ON p.PLC_NO = s.SEE_PLC_NO WHERE p.PLC_NO = #{plcNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE PLACE SET PLC_USE_YN = #{useYn}, PLC_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE PLC_NO = #{plcNo}
